<div class="quiz-shell edu-math-guessing-quiz" data-default-total="5"></div>

<script>
  (() => {
    const SVG_NS = "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg";
    const DEFAULT_TOPIC = "functions-graphs";
    const QUESTION_BANKS = {
      "expressions-equations": [
        expandedFormQuestion,
        factoredFormQuestion,
        linearEquationQuestion,
      ],
      "inequalities-absolute-value": [
        linearInequalityQuestion,
        absoluteValueInequalityQuestion,
        intervalNotationQuestion,
      ],
      "functions-graphs": [graphExpressionQuestion, functionValueQuestion],
      "transformations-composition-inverses": [
        transformationDescriptionQuestion,
        compositionQuestion,
        inverseQuestion,
      ],
      "linear-quadratic": [
        lineFeatureQuestion,
        quadraticVertexQuestion,
        quadraticRootsQuestion,
        graphExpressionQuestion,
      ],
      polynomials: [
        polynomialRootsQuestion,
        polynomialEndBehaviorQuestion,
        polynomialMultiplicityQuestion,
      ],
      "rational-radical-functions": [
        rationalDomainQuestion,
        rationalHoleQuestion,
        radicalDomainQuestion,
        radicalEquationQuestion,
      ],
      "exponentials-logarithms": [
        exponentialValueQuestion,
        logarithmValueQuestion,
        exponentialEquationQuestion,
        logarithmRewriteQuestion,
        growthDecayQuestion,
        logarithmDomainQuestion,
      ],
      "systems-equations": [systemSolutionQuestion, systemClassificationQuestion],
      "algebraic-modeling": [
        modelFamilyQuestion,
        parameterMeaningQuestion,
        wordsToEquationQuestion,
        tableModelQuestion,
      ],
      "symbolic-computation-sympy": [
        sympyCommandQuestion,
        sympyOutputQuestion,
        sympySyntaxQuestion,
        sympyDomainWarningQuestion,
      ],
      "algebra-cumulative-review": [
        expandedFormQuestion,
        linearInequalityQuestion,
        functionValueQuestion,
        transformationDescriptionQuestion,
        quadraticRootsQuestion,
        rationalDomainQuestion,
        exponentialEquationQuestion,
        systemSolutionQuestion,
        modelFamilyQuestion,
        sympyCommandQuestion,
      ],
    };

    document
      .querySelectorAll(".edu-math-guessing-quiz:not([data-ready])")
      .forEach(initQuiz);

    function initQuiz(root) {
      const config = findConfig(root);
      const state = {
        config,
        total: config.defaultTotal,
        index: 0,
        score: 0,
        question: null,
        answered: false,
      };

      root.dataset.ready = "true";
      renderStart(root, state);
    }

    function findConfig(root) {
      const configNode = root.previousElementSibling;
      let parsed = {};

      if (configNode?.classList?.contains("edu-math-guessing-game-config")) {
        try {
          parsed = JSON.parse(configNode.textContent || "{}");
        } catch {
          parsed = {};
        }
      }

      const topic = normalizeTopic(parsed.topic || root.dataset.topic || DEFAULT_TOPIC);
      const defaultTotal = Math.max(
        1,
        Math.min(100, Number(parsed.defaultTotal || root.dataset.defaultTotal) || 5),
      );

      return {
        topic,
        defaultTotal,
        title: parsed.title || "Topic guessing game",
      };
    }

    function renderStart(root, state) {
      root.replaceChildren();

      const input = element("input", {
        class: "quiz-count",
        type: "number",
        min: "1",
        max: "100",
        value: String(state.total),
      });
      const button = element("button", { type: "button" }, "Start quiz");
      const label = element(
        "label",
        {},
        element("span", {}, "Number of questions"),
        input,
      );
      const controls = element("div", { class: "quiz-start" }, label, button);

      button.addEventListener("click", () => {
        state.total = Math.max(1, Math.min(100, Number(input.value) || 5));
        state.index = 0;
        state.score = 0;
        startQuestion(root, state);
      });

      root.append(
        element("p", { class: "quiz-topic" }, state.config.title),
        controls,
      );
    }

    function startQuestion(root, state) {
      state.question = makeQuestion(state.config);
      state.answered = false;
      renderQuestion(root, state);
    }

    function renderQuestion(root, state) {
      const question = state.question;
      root.replaceChildren();

      const progress = element(
        "div",
        { class: "quiz-progress" },
        element("span", {}, `Question ${state.index + 1} of ${state.total}`),
        element("span", {}, `Score: ${state.score}/${state.total}`),
      );
      const feedback = element("p", {
        class: "quiz-feedback",
        "aria-live": "polite",
      });
      const next = element(
        "button",
        { type: "button", disabled: "" },
        "Next question",
      );
      const options = radioList(question.options, (option) => {
        if (state.answered) return;

        state.answered = true;
        const correct = option.id === question.answer.id;
        if (correct) state.score += 1;

        feedback.className = correct
          ? "quiz-feedback correct"
          : "quiz-feedback wrong";
        feedback.replaceChildren();
        if (correct) {
          feedback.append("Correct.");
        } else {
          feedback.append(
            "Not quite. The answer is ",
            element("code", {}, question.answer.label),
            ".",
          );
        }
        if (question.explanation) {
          feedback.append(" ", question.explanation);
        }

        options.querySelectorAll("input").forEach((input) => {
          input.disabled = true;
        });
        next.disabled = false;
        progress.lastElementChild.textContent = `Score: ${state.score}/${state.total}`;
      });

      next.addEventListener("click", () => {
        state.index += 1;
        if (state.index < state.total) {
          startQuestion(root, state);
        } else {
          renderComplete(root, state);
        }
      });

      root.append(progress);
      if (question.stimulus) root.append(question.stimulus);
      root.append(
        element("p", { class: "quiz-prompt" }, question.prompt),
        feedback,
        options,
        next,
      );
    }

    function renderComplete(root, state) {
      root.replaceChildren();

      const restart = element("button", { type: "button" }, "Start another quiz");
      restart.addEventListener("click", () => renderStart(root, state));

      root.append(
        element(
          "div",
          { class: "quiz-complete" },
          element("h3", {}, "Quiz complete"),
          element("p", {}, `Final score: ${state.score}/${state.total}`),
        ),
        restart,
      );
    }

    function makeQuestion(config) {
      const bank = QUESTION_BANKS[config.topic] || QUESTION_BANKS[DEFAULT_TOPIC];
      return choice(bank)(config);
    }

    function graphExpressionQuestion() {
      const answer = randomGraphExpression();
      const distractors = [];
      while (distractors.length < 8) {
        distractors.push(randomGraphExpression().label);
      }

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the expression that matches the graph.",
        stimulus: graphStimulus(answer.evaluate, `Graph of ${answer.label}`),
        answer: answer.label,
        distractors,
        explanation:
          "Use shape, intercepts, curvature, and end behavior to eliminate distractors.",
      });
    }

    function expandedFormQuestion() {
      const a = nonzeroInt(-6, 6);
      const b = nonzeroInt(-6, 6);
      const expression = `${formatBinomial(a)}${formatBinomial(b)}`;
      const middle = a + b;
      const constant = a * b;
      const answer = formatPolynomial([
        [1, "x²"],
        [middle, "x"],
        [constant, ""],
      ]);

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the expanded form.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(expression),
        answer,
        distractors: [
          formatPolynomial([
            [1, "x²"],
            [a - b, "x"],
            [constant, ""],
          ]),
          formatPolynomial([
            [1, "x²"],
            [middle, "x"],
            [a + b, ""],
          ]),
          `${formatBinomial(a + b)}²`,
          formatPolynomial([
            [1, "x²"],
            [-middle, "x"],
            [constant, ""],
          ]),
        ],
        explanation: "The middle coefficient is the sum of the two constants.",
      });
    }

    function factoredFormQuestion() {
      const r = nonzeroInt(-6, 6);
      let s = nonzeroInt(-6, 6);
      while (s === r) s = nonzeroInt(-6, 6);
      const expression = formatPolynomial([
        [1, "x²"],
        [-(r + s), "x"],
        [r * s, ""],
      ]);
      const answer = `${formatRootFactor(r)}${formatRootFactor(s)}`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the factored form.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(expression),
        answer,
        distractors: [
          `${formatRootFactor(-r)}${formatRootFactor(s)}`,
          `${formatRootFactor(r)}${formatRootFactor(-s)}`,
          `${formatRootFactor(r + s)}${formatRootFactor(r * s)}`,
          `${formatRootFactor(-r)}${formatRootFactor(-s)}`,
        ],
        explanation: "The roots are the values that make each factor equal zero.",
      });
    }

    function linearEquationQuestion() {
      const a = nonzeroInt(-8, 8);
      const x0 = int(-8, 8);
      const b = int(-12, 12);
      const c = a * x0 + b;
      const equation = `${formatLinearExpression(a, b)} = ${c}`;
      const answer = `x = ${x0}`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Solve the equation for x.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(equation),
        answer,
        distractors: [`x = ${-x0}`, `x = ${x0 + 1}`, `x = ${x0 - 1}`, `x = ${c - b}`],
        explanation: "Undo addition/subtraction first, then divide by the coefficient of x.",
      });
    }

    function linearInequalityQuestion() {
      const a = nonzeroInt(1, 8);
      const x0 = int(-7, 7);
      const b = int(-10, 10);
      const c = a * x0 + b;
      const sign = choice(["<", "≤", ">", "≥"]);
      const equation = `${formatLinearExpression(a, b)} ${sign} ${c}`;
      const answer = `x ${sign} ${x0}`;
      const flipped = sign === "<" ? ">" : sign === "≤" ? "≥" : sign === ">" ? "<" : "≤";

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the solution set.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(equation),
        answer,
        distractors: [`x ${flipped} ${x0}`, `x ${sign} ${-x0}`, `x ${flipped} ${-x0}`, `x = ${x0}`],
        explanation: "Because the coefficient of x is positive, the inequality direction stays the same.",
      });
    }

    function absoluteValueInequalityQuestion() {
      const h = int(-5, 5);
      const radius = int(1, 7);
      const inclusive = choice([true, false]);
      const sign = inclusive ? "≤" : "<";
      const expression = `|x ${formatSigned(-h)}| ${sign} ${radius}`;
      const left = h - radius;
      const right = h + radius;
      const answer = `${left} ${sign} x ${sign} ${right}`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the interval described by this distance statement.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(expression),
        answer,
        distractors: [
          `x ${sign} ${left} or x ${sign === "≤" ? "≥" : ">"} ${right}`,
          `${-right} ${sign} x ${sign} ${-left}`,
          `${h} ${sign} x ${sign} ${right}`,
          `x = ${h}`,
        ],
        explanation: "Absolute value measures distance from the center, so the solution is between the endpoints.",
      });
    }

    function intervalNotationQuestion() {
      const left = int(-9, 0);
      const right = int(1, 10);
      const leftClosed = choice([true, false]);
      const rightClosed = choice([true, false]);
      const leftSymbol = leftClosed ? "≤" : "<";
      const rightSymbol = rightClosed ? "≤" : "<";
      const statement = `${left} ${leftSymbol} x ${rightSymbol} ${right}`;
      const answer = `${leftClosed ? "[" : "("}${left}, ${right}${rightClosed ? "]" : ")"}`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the matching interval notation.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(statement),
        answer,
        distractors: [
          `${leftClosed ? "(" : "["}${left}, ${right}${rightClosed ? "]" : ")"}`,
          `${leftClosed ? "[" : "("}${left}, ${right}${rightClosed ? ")" : "]"}`,
          `${rightClosed ? "[" : "("}${right}, ${left}${leftClosed ? "]" : ")"}`,
          `(-∞, ${left}) ∪ (${right}, ∞)`,
        ],
        explanation: "Square brackets include endpoints; parentheses exclude endpoints.",
      });
    }

    function functionValueQuestion() {
      const a = nonzeroInt(-4, 4);
      const b = int(-6, 6);
      const c = int(-5, 5);
      const x = int(-4, 4);
      const value = a * x * x + b * x + c;
      const formula = `f(x) = ${formatPolynomial([
        [a, "x²"],
        [b, "x"],
        [c, ""],
      ])};  find f(${x})`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the function value.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(formula),
        answer: String(value),
        distractors: [String(value + a), String(value - b), String(-value), String(value + x)],
        explanation: "Substitute the input into every occurrence of x before simplifying.",
      });
    }

    function transformationDescriptionQuestion() {
      const h = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
      const k = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
      const expression = `g(x) = (x ${formatSigned(-h)})² ${formatSigned(k)}`;
      const horizontal = h > 0 ? `right ${h}` : `left ${Math.abs(h)}`;
      const vertical = k > 0 ? `up ${k}` : `down ${Math.abs(k)}`;
      const answer = `shift ${horizontal}, ${vertical}`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Describe the transformation from f(x) = x² to g(x).",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(expression),
        answer,
        distractors: [
          `shift ${h > 0 ? `left ${h}` : `right ${Math.abs(h)}`}, ${vertical}`,
          `shift ${horizontal}, ${k > 0 ? `down ${k}` : `up ${Math.abs(k)}`}`,
          `stretch vertically by ${Math.abs(h)}`,
          `reflect across the x-axis and shift ${vertical}`,
        ],
        explanation: "Inside the parentheses moves the graph horizontally in the opposite sign direction.",
      });
    }

    function compositionQuestion() {
      const a = nonzeroInt(-4, 4);
      const b = int(-6, 6);
      const c = nonzeroInt(-4, 4);
      const d = int(-6, 6);
      const composedA = a * c;
      const composedB = a * d + b;
      const stimulus = multiLineStimulus([
        `f(x) = ${formatLinearExpression(a, b)}`,
        `g(x) = ${formatLinearExpression(c, d)}`,
        "Find (f ∘ g)(x).",
      ]);
      const answer = formatLinearExpression(composedA, composedB);

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the composition.",
        stimulus,
        answer,
        distractors: [
          formatLinearExpression(a * c, b + d),
          formatLinearExpression(a + c, b + d),
          formatLinearExpression(c * a, c * b + d),
          formatLinearExpression(a * c, a * b + d),
        ],
        explanation: "Composition means substitute the entire formula for g(x) into f.",
      });
    }

    function inverseQuestion() {
      const a = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
      const b = int(-8, 8);
      const stimulus = mathStimulus(`f(x) = ${formatLinearExpression(a, b)}`);
      const answer = `f⁻¹(x) = ${formatInverseLinear(a, b)}`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the inverse function.",
        stimulus,
        answer,
        distractors: [
          `f⁻¹(x) = ${formatLinearExpression(a, -b)}`,
          `f⁻¹(x) = ${formatInverseLinear(a, -b)}`,
          `f⁻¹(x) = ${formatInverseLinear(-a, b)}`,
          `f⁻¹(x) = ${formatLinearExpression(1, b)}`,
        ],
        explanation: "Swap x and y, then solve the new equation for y.",
      });
    }

    function lineFeatureQuestion() {
      const m = nonzeroInt(-6, 6);
      const b = int(-8, 8);
      const stimulus = mathStimulus(`y = ${formatLinearExpression(m, b)}`);
      const answer = `slope ${m}; y-intercept ${b}`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the slope and y-intercept.",
        stimulus,
        answer,
        distractors: [
          `slope ${b}; y-intercept ${m}`,
          `slope ${-m}; y-intercept ${b}`,
          `slope ${m}; y-intercept ${-b}`,
          `slope ${m + b}; y-intercept ${b}`,
        ],
        explanation: "In slope-intercept form y = mx + b, m is slope and b is the y-intercept.",
      });
    }

    function quadraticVertexQuestion() {
      const a = nonzeroInt(-3, 3);
      const h = int(-6, 6);
      const k = int(-6, 6);
      const stimulus = mathStimulus(
        `y = ${formatVertexCoefficient(a)}(x ${formatSigned(-h)})² ${formatSigned(k)}`,
      );
      const answer = `(${h}, ${k})`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the vertex.",
        stimulus,
        answer,
        distractors: [`(${-h}, ${k})`, `(${h}, ${-k})`, `(${-h}, ${-k})`, `(${k}, ${h})`],
        explanation: "Vertex form y = a(x − h)² + k has vertex (h, k).",
      });
    }

    function quadraticRootsQuestion() {
      const r = int(-6, 1);
      const s = int(2, 8);
      const stimulus = mathStimulus(`y = ${formatRootFactor(r)}${formatRootFactor(s)}`);
      const answer = `x = ${r} and x = ${s}`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the x-intercepts.",
        stimulus,
        answer,
        distractors: [
          `x = ${-r} and x = ${-s}`,
          `x = ${r + s} and x = ${r * s}`,
          `x = ${r} only`,
          `x = ${s - r} and x = ${r - s}`,
        ],
        explanation: "Each factor equals zero at one x-intercept.",
      });
    }

    function polynomialRootsQuestion() {
      const roots = distinctInts(3, -5, 5).sort((a, b) => a - b);
      const stimulus = mathStimulus(`p(x) = ${roots.map(formatRootFactor).join("")}`);
      const answer = `roots: ${roots.join(", ")}`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the roots of the polynomial.",
        stimulus,
        answer,
        distractors: [
          `roots: ${roots.map((root) => -root).join(", ")}`,
          `roots: ${roots.slice(0, 2).join(", ")}`,
          `roots: ${roots.map((root) => root + 1).join(", ")}`,
          "no real roots",
        ],
        explanation: "A product is zero when at least one factor is zero.",
      });
    }

    function polynomialEndBehaviorQuestion() {
      const degree = int(2, 6);
      const leading = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
      const stimulus = mathStimulus(`leading term: ${formatCoefficient(leading, `x${superscript(degree)}`)}`);
      const answer = endBehaviorLabel(degree, leading);

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the end behavior.",
        stimulus,
        answer,
        distractors: [
          endBehaviorLabel(degree, -leading),
          endBehaviorLabel(degree + 1, leading),
          "both ends approach 0",
          "left up, right down",
        ],
        explanation: "End behavior is controlled by degree parity and the sign of the leading coefficient.",
      });
    }

    function polynomialMultiplicityQuestion() {
      const root = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
      const other = root + choice([-3, -2, 2, 3]);
      const multiplicity = choice([2, 3]);
      const stimulus = mathStimulus(`p(x) = ${formatRootFactor(root)}${superscript(multiplicity)}${formatRootFactor(other)}`);
      const answer = multiplicity % 2 === 0 ? `touches at x = ${root}` : `crosses at x = ${root}`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "What does the graph do at the repeated root?",
        stimulus,
        answer,
        distractors: [
          multiplicity % 2 === 0 ? `crosses at x = ${root}` : `touches at x = ${root}`,
          `has no root at x = ${root}`,
          `has a vertical asymptote at x = ${root}`,
          `touches at x = ${other}`,
        ],
        explanation: "Even multiplicity bounces; odd multiplicity crosses.",
      });
    }

    function rationalDomainQuestion() {
      const roots = distinctInts(2, -6, 6).sort((a, b) => a - b);
      const stimulus = mathStimulus(`f(x) = (x + 1)/${roots.map(formatRootFactor).join("")}`);
      const answer = `x ≠ ${roots[0]} and x ≠ ${roots[1]}`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the domain restriction.",
        stimulus,
        answer,
        distractors: [
          `x = ${roots[0]} and x = ${roots[1]}`,
          `x ≠ ${-roots[0]} and x ≠ ${-roots[1]}`,
          `x > ${roots[0]} and x < ${roots[1]}`,
          "all real numbers",
        ],
        explanation: "A rational function is undefined where its denominator is zero.",
      });
    }

    function rationalHoleQuestion() {
      const root = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
      const expressionLabel = `(x² - ${root * root})/${formatRootFactor(root)}`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "What graph feature comes from the canceled factor?",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(expressionLabel),
        answer: `hole at x = ${root}`,
        distractors: [
          `vertical asymptote at x = ${root}`,
          `hole at x = ${-root}`,
          "horizontal asymptote only",
          "no restriction",
        ],
        explanation: "A denominator factor that cancels creates a missing point rather than a vertical asymptote.",
      });
    }

    function radicalDomainQuestion() {
      const h = int(-6, 6);
      const stimulus = mathStimulus(`g(x) = √(x ${formatSigned(-h)})`);

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the real-valued domain.",
        stimulus,
        answer: `x ≥ ${h}`,
        distractors: [`x ≤ ${h}`, `x > ${h}`, "all real numbers", `x ≠ ${h}`],
        explanation: "For a square root, the radicand must be nonnegative.",
      });
    }

    function radicalEquationQuestion() {
      const c = int(1, 8);
      const value = int(2, 6);
      const solution = value * value - c;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Solve the radical equation.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(`√(x + ${c}) = ${value}`),
        answer: `x = ${solution}`,
        distractors: [`x = ${value - c}`, `x = ${value + c}`, `x = ${-solution}`, "no real solution"],
        explanation: "Square both sides, then check the candidate in the original equation.",
      });
    }

    function exponentialValueQuestion() {
      const base = choice([2, 3, 4, 5]);
      const exponent = int(2, 5);
      const value = base ** exponent;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Evaluate the exponential expression.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(`${base}${superscript(exponent)}`),
        answer: String(value),
        distractors: [String(base * exponent), String(base + exponent), String(value / base), String(value + base)],
        explanation: "An exponent counts repeated multiplication, not ordinary multiplication.",
      });
    }

    function logarithmValueQuestion() {
      const base = choice([2, 3, 4, 5]);
      const exponent = int(2, 4);
      const value = base ** exponent;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Evaluate the logarithm.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(`log_${base}(${value})`),
        answer: String(exponent),
        distractors: [String(base), String(value / base), String(exponent + 1), String(base * exponent)],
        explanation: "A logarithm asks which exponent produces the given value.",
      });
    }

    function exponentialEquationQuestion() {
      const base = choice([2, 3, 4, 5]);
      const exponent = int(-2, 4);
      const value = base ** exponent;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Solve for x.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(`${base}^x = ${formatNumber(value)}`),
        answer: `x = ${exponent}`,
        distractors: [`x = ${base}`, `x = ${value}`, `x = ${-exponent}`, `x = ${exponent + 1}`],
        explanation: "Rewrite both sides using the same base, then compare exponents.",
      });
    }

    function logarithmRewriteQuestion() {
      const base = choice([2, 3, 4, 5]);
      const exponent = int(2, 4);
      const value = base ** exponent;
      const statement = `log_${base}(${value}) = ${exponent}`;
      const answer = `${base}${superscript(exponent)} = ${value}`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the equivalent exponential statement.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(statement),
        answer,
        distractors: [
          `${exponent}${superscript(base)} = ${value}`,
          `${base}${superscript(value)} = ${exponent}`,
          `${value}${superscript(exponent)} = ${base}`,
          `${base} × ${exponent} = ${value}`,
        ],
        explanation: "The base of the logarithm becomes the base of the exponential form.",
      });
    }

    function growthDecayQuestion() {
      const initial = choice([100, 200, 500, 1000]);
      const rate = choice([3, 5, 8, 12, 20]);
      const grows = choice([true, false]);
      const factor = grows ? 1 + rate / 100 : 1 - rate / 100;
      const label = `${initial}(${formatNumber(factor)})^t`;
      const answer = grows ? `growth by ${rate}%` : `decay by ${rate}%`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Interpret the model.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(label),
        answer,
        distractors: [
          grows ? `decay by ${rate}%` : `growth by ${rate}%`,
          `growth by ${formatNumber(factor)}%`,
          `initial value ${rate}`,
          "linear change",
        ],
        explanation: "Compare the base with 1: above 1 grows; between 0 and 1 decays.",
      });
    }

    function logarithmDomainQuestion() {
      const h = int(-6, 6);

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the domain restriction.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(`log(x ${formatSigned(-h)})`),
        answer: `x > ${h}`,
        distractors: [`x ≥ ${h}`, `x < ${h}`, `x ≠ ${h}`, "all real numbers"],
        explanation: "The input to a real logarithm must be positive.",
      });
    }

    function systemSolutionQuestion() {
      const x0 = int(-4, 4);
      const y0 = int(-4, 4);
      let a = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
      let b = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
      let c = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
      let d = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
      while (a * d - b * c === 0) {
        a = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
        b = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
        c = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
        d = nonzeroInt(-5, 5);
      }
      const e = a * x0 + b * y0;
      const f = c * x0 + d * y0;
      const stimulus = multiLineStimulus([
        `${formatSystemSide(a, b)} = ${e}`,
        `${formatSystemSide(c, d)} = ${f}`,
      ]);
      const answer = `(${x0}, ${y0})`;

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Select the solution of the system.",
        stimulus,
        answer,
        distractors: [`(${y0}, ${x0})`, `(${-x0}, ${y0})`, `(${x0}, ${-y0})`, `(${x0 + 1}, ${y0 - 1})`],
        explanation: "The solution is the ordered pair that satisfies both equations.",
      });
    }

    function systemClassificationQuestion() {
      const kind = choice(["one", "none", "infinite"]);
      let lines;
      let answer;
      if (kind === "infinite") {
        lines = ["2x + 3y = 12", "4x + 6y = 24"];
        answer = "infinitely many solutions";
      } else if (kind === "none") {
        lines = ["2x + 3y = 12", "4x + 6y = 20"];
        answer = "no solution";
      } else {
        lines = ["2x + 3y = 12", "x - y = 1"];
        answer = "one solution";
      }

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Classify the system.",
        stimulus: multiLineStimulus(lines),
        answer,
        distractors: ["one solution", "no solution", "infinitely many solutions", "not enough information"],
        explanation: "Compare slopes and constants: intersecting, parallel, or identical lines give different solution counts.",
      });
    }

    function modelFamilyQuestion() {
      const scenarios = [
        ["A value increases by 6% each year.", "exponential"],
        ["A fixed fee plus a charge per mile.", "linear"],
        ["Area of a square from its side length.", "quadratic"],
        ["Time equals distance divided by speed.", "rational"],
        ["Side length of a square from its area.", "radical"],
      ];
      const [scenario, answer] = choice(scenarios);

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Choose the best model family.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(scenario),
        answer,
        distractors: ["linear", "quadratic", "rational", "exponential", "radical"].filter((item) => item !== answer),
        explanation: "Match the model family to the kind of change or operation in the context.",
      });
    }

    function parameterMeaningQuestion() {
      const fixed = choice([20, 35, 50, 100]);
      const rate = choice([4, 8, 12, 25]);

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Interpret the model parameters.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(`C(n) = ${fixed} + ${rate}n`),
        answer: `fixed cost ${fixed}; per-item cost ${rate}`,
        distractors: [
          `fixed cost ${rate}; per-item cost ${fixed}`,
          `growth rate ${rate}%`,
          `maximum value ${fixed}`,
          "not enough information",
        ],
        explanation: "In a linear cost model, the constant term is the starting cost and the coefficient is the rate.",
      });
    }

    function wordsToEquationQuestion() {
      const x = "x";
      const scenarios = [
        [`five more than twice ${x}`, "2x + 5", ["2(x + 5)", "5x + 2", "2x - 5"]],
        [`three less than ${x}`, "x - 3", ["3 - x", "3x", "x + 3"]],
        [`${x} decreased by 20%`, "0.8x", ["1.2x", "20x", "x - 0.2"]],
      ];
      const [scenario, answer, distractors] = choice(scenarios);

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Choose the matching algebraic expression.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(scenario),
        answer,
        distractors,
        explanation: "Translate the words in order and keep track of rates and units.",
      });
    }

    function tableModelQuestion() {
      const kind = choice(["linear", "exponential"]);
      const stimulus =
        kind === "linear"
          ? multiLineStimulus(["x: 0, 1, 2, 3", "y: 5, 8, 11, 14"])
          : multiLineStimulus(["x: 0, 1, 2, 3", "y: 5, 10, 20, 40"]);

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Which model family best matches the table?",
        stimulus,
        answer: kind,
        distractors: ["linear", "quadratic", "exponential", "radical"].filter((item) => item !== kind),
        explanation: "Constant differences suggest linear; constant ratios suggest exponential.",
      });
    }

    function sympyCommandQuestion() {
      const tasks = [
        ["Factor x² - 5x + 6.", "sp.factor(...)"],
        ["Expand (x + 2)(x - 3).", "sp.expand(...)"],
        ["Solve 3x - 7 = 11.", "sp.solve(...)"],
        ["Combine rational terms.", "sp.together(...)"],
        ["Check a candidate solution.", "sp.checksol(...)"],
      ];
      const [task, answer] = choice(tasks);

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Choose the best SymPy command.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(task),
        answer,
        distractors: ["sp.factor(...)", "sp.expand(...)", "sp.solve(...)", "sp.checksol(...)", "sp.together(...)"].filter((item) => item !== answer),
        explanation: "Choose the command that matches the algebraic action.",
      });
    }

    function sympyOutputQuestion() {
      const a = int(-5, 5);
      const b = int(-5, 5);
      const middle = a + b;
      const constant = a * b;
      const expressionLabel = `sp.expand(${formatBinomial(a)}${formatBinomial(b)})`;
      const answer = formatPolynomial([
        [1, "x²"],
        [middle, "x"],
        [constant, ""],
      ]);

      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Predict the SymPy output in ordinary math notation.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus(expressionLabel),
        answer,
        distractors: [
          formatPolynomial([[1, "x²"], [a - b, "x"], [constant, ""]]),
          formatPolynomial([[1, "x²"], [middle, "x"], [a + b, ""]]),
          `${formatBinomial(a)}${formatBinomial(b)}`,
          "True",
        ],
        explanation: "SymPy's expand command multiplies out the factors.",
      });
    }

    function sympySyntaxQuestion() {
      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "Choose valid Python/SymPy syntax for two times x squared.",
        stimulus: mathStimulus("two times x squared"),
        answer: "2*x**2",
        distractors: ["2x^2", "2*x^2", "2x**2", "2(x**2)"],
        explanation: "Python requires explicit multiplication and uses ** for powers.",
      });
    }

    function sympyDomainWarningQuestion() {
      return choiceQuestion({
        prompt: "What warning is needed after canceling?",
        stimulus: mathStimulus("sp.cancel((x² - 1)/(x - 1)) → x + 1"),
        answer: "original expression excludes x = 1",
        distractors: [
          "x + 1 is valid for every original input",
          "original expression excludes x = -1 only",
          "there is a vertical asymptote at x = 1",
          "no warning is needed",
        ],
        explanation: "The canceled denominator factor creates a hole in the original expression.",
      });
    }

    function choiceQuestion({ prompt, stimulus, answer, distractors, explanation }) {
      const answerOption = option(answer);
      return {
        prompt,
        stimulus,
        answer: answerOption,
        options: buildOptions(answerOption, distractors),
        explanation,
      };
    }

    function buildOptions(answer, distractors) {
      const options = [answer];
      const seen = new Set([answer.label]);
      for (const distractor of distractors) {
        const candidate = option(distractor);
        if (!seen.has(candidate.label)) {
          seen.add(candidate.label);
          options.push(candidate);
        }
        if (options.length >= 4) break;
      }

      for (const fallback of ["not enough information", "no real solution", "all real numbers", "none of these"]) {
        if (options.length >= 4) break;
        if (!seen.has(fallback)) options.push(option(fallback));
      }

      return shuffle(options);
    }

    function option(label) {
      return {
        id: String(label),
        label: String(label),
      };
    }

    function radioList(options, onSelect) {
      const groupName = uniqueName();
      const form = element("form", {
        class: "quiz-options",
        role: "radiogroup",
        "aria-label": "Answer options",
      });

      for (const option of options) {
        const input = element("input", { type: "radio", name: groupName });
        const label = element(
          "label",
          { class: "quiz-option" },
          input,
          element("span", {}, option.label),
        );

        input.addEventListener("change", () => onSelect(option));
        form.append(label);
      }

      return form;
    }

    function graphStimulus(evaluate, ariaLabel) {
      return element("div", { class: "quiz-stimulus" }, drawGraph(evaluate, ariaLabel));
    }

    function mathStimulus(label) {
      return element("div", { class: "quiz-stimulus" }, element("div", { class: "quiz-math" }, label));
    }

    function multiLineStimulus(lines) {
      return element(
        "div",
        { class: "quiz-stimulus quiz-system" },
        ...lines.map((line) => element("div", { class: "quiz-math" }, line)),
      );
    }

    function drawGraph(evaluate, ariaLabel) {
      const width = 720;
      const height = 360;
      const margin = { top: 24, right: 24, bottom: 36, left: 46 };
      const xs = Array.from({ length: 401 }, (_, i) => -10 + (i * 20) / 400);
      const points = xs
        .map((x) => ({ x, y: evaluate(x) }))
        .filter((point) => Number.isFinite(point.y));
      const yValues = points.map((point) => point.y).sort((a, b) => a - b);
      const low = Math.min(quantile(yValues, 0.02), -5);
      const high = Math.max(quantile(yValues, 0.98), 5);
      const yPadding = Math.max((high - low) * 0.08, 1);
      const yMin = low - yPadding;
      const yMax = high + yPadding;
      const plotWidth = width - margin.left - margin.right;
      const plotHeight = height - margin.top - margin.bottom;
      const xScale = (x) => margin.left + ((x + 10) / 20) * plotWidth;
      const yScale = (y) => margin.top + ((yMax - y) / (yMax - yMin)) * plotHeight;
      const svg = svgElement("svg", {
        viewBox: `0 0 ${width} ${height}`,
        role: "img",
        "aria-label": ariaLabel,
        class: "quiz-graph",
      });
      const xAxisY = yScale(0);
      const yAxisX = xScale(0);

      for (const tick of ticks(yMin, yMax, 8)) {
        const y = yScale(tick);
        svg.append(
          svgElement("line", {
            x1: margin.left,
            y1: y,
            x2: width - margin.right,
            y2: y,
            class: "quiz-grid-line",
          }),
        );
        svg.append(
          svgText(margin.left - 8, y + 4, formatTick(tick), {
            "text-anchor": "end",
          }),
        );
      }

      for (let tick = -10; tick <= 10; tick += 2) {
        const x = xScale(tick);
        svg.append(
          svgElement("line", {
            x1: x,
            y1: margin.top,
            x2: x,
            y2: height - margin.bottom,
            class: "quiz-grid-line quiz-grid-line-vertical",
          }),
        );
        svg.append(svgText(x, height - margin.bottom + 20, String(tick)));
      }

      svg.append(
        svgElement("line", {
          x1: margin.left,
          y1: xAxisY,
          x2: width - margin.right,
          y2: xAxisY,
          class: "quiz-axis",
        }),
        svgElement("line", {
          x1: yAxisX,
          y1: margin.top,
          x2: yAxisX,
          y2: height - margin.bottom,
          class: "quiz-axis",
        }),
        svgElement("polyline", {
          fill: "none",
          stroke: "#1a73e8",
          "stroke-width": "3",
          points: points.map((point) => `${xScale(point.x)},${yScale(point.y)}`).join(" "),
        }),
      );

      return svg;
    }

    function randomGraphExpression() {
      const kind = choice(["linear", "quadratic", "cubic", "sine", "cosine"]);

      if (kind === "linear") {
        const m = nonzeroInt(-4, 4);
        const b = int(-6, 6);
        return expression(formatLinearExpression(m, b), (x) => m * x + b);
      }

      if (kind === "quadratic") {
        const a = nonzeroInt(-3, 3);
        const b = int(-5, 5);
        const c = int(-6, 6);
        return expression(
          formatPolynomial([
            [a, "x²"],
            [b, "x"],
            [c, ""],
          ]),
          (x) => a * x * x + b * x + c,
        );
      }

      if (kind === "cubic") {
        const a = nonzeroInt(-2, 2);
        const b = int(-3, 3);
        const c = int(-4, 4);
        return expression(
          formatPolynomial([
            [a, "x³"],
            [b, "x"],
            [c, ""],
          ]),
          (x) => a * x * x * x + b * x + c,
        );
      }

      if (kind === "sine") {
        const a = nonzeroInt(-4, 4);
        const k = nonzeroInt(1, 4);
        return expression(`${formatVertexCoefficient(a)}sin(${k}x)`, (x) => a * Math.sin(k * x));
      }

      const a = nonzeroInt(-4, 4);
      const k = nonzeroInt(1, 4);
      return expression(`${formatVertexCoefficient(a)}cos(${k}x)`, (x) => a * Math.cos(k * x));
    }

    function expression(label, evaluate) {
      return { label, evaluate };
    }

    function element(tag, attributes = {}, ...children) {
      const node = document.createElement(tag);
      setAttributes(node, attributes);
      node.append(...children.flat());
      return node;
    }

    function svgElement(tag, attributes = {}) {
      const node = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, tag);
      setAttributes(node, attributes);
      return node;
    }

    function svgText(x, y, text, attributes = {}) {
      const node = svgElement("text", {
        x,
        y,
        class: "quiz-axis-label",
        ...attributes,
      });
      node.textContent = text;
      return node;
    }

    function setAttributes(node, attributes) {
      for (const [name, value] of Object.entries(attributes)) {
        if (value === "") {
          node.setAttribute(name, "");
        } else if (value !== null && value !== undefined) {
          node.setAttribute(name, String(value));
        }
      }
    }

    function normalizeTopic(topic) {
      return String(topic).trim().toLowerCase() || DEFAULT_TOPIC;
    }

    function choice(values) {
      return values[Math.floor(Math.random() * values.length)];
    }

    function int(min, max) {
      return Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min;
    }

    function nonzeroInt(min, max) {
      let value = 0;
      while (value === 0) value = int(min, max);
      return value;
    }

    function distinctInts(count, min, max) {
      const values = new Set();
      while (values.size < count) values.add(int(min, max));
      return Array.from(values);
    }

    function shuffle(values) {
      const copy = values.slice();
      for (let i = copy.length - 1; i > 0; i -= 1) {
        const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
        [copy[i], copy[j]] = [copy[j], copy[i]];
      }
      return copy;
    }

    function quantile(sortedValues, p) {
      const index = Math.min(
        sortedValues.length - 1,
        Math.max(0, Math.floor(sortedValues.length * p)),
      );
      return sortedValues[index];
    }

    function ticks(min, max, count) {
      const step = (max - min) / count;
      return Array.from({ length: count + 1 }, (_, i) => min + i * step);
    }

    function formatPolynomial(terms) {
      const parts = [];
      for (const [coefficient, variable] of terms) {
        if (coefficient === 0) continue;
        const absCoefficient = Math.abs(coefficient);
        const body = variable
          ? `${absCoefficient === 1 ? "" : absCoefficient}${variable}`
          : String(absCoefficient);
        if (parts.length === 0) {
          parts.push(coefficient < 0 ? `-${body}` : body);
        } else {
          parts.push(coefficient < 0 ? ` - ${body}` : ` + ${body}`);
        }
      }
      return parts.join("") || "0";
    }

    function formatLinearExpression(a, b) {
      return formatPolynomial([
        [a, "x"],
        [b, ""],
      ]);
    }

    function formatSystemSide(a, b) {
      return formatPolynomial([
        [a, "x"],
        [b, "y"],
      ]);
    }

    function formatCoefficient(value, variable) {
      if (value === 1) return variable || "1";
      if (value === -1) return variable ? `-${variable}` : "-1";
      return `${value}${variable}`;
    }

    function formatVertexCoefficient(value) {
      if (value === 1) return "";
      if (value === -1) return "-";
      return String(value);
    }

    function formatSigned(value) {
      if (value === 0) return "+ 0";
      return value > 0 ? `+ ${value}` : `- ${Math.abs(value)}`;
    }

    function formatBinomial(constant) {
      return `(x ${formatSigned(constant)})`;
    }

    function formatRootFactor(root) {
      if (root === 0) return "x";
      return `(x ${formatSigned(-root)})`;
    }

    function formatInverseLinear(a, b) {
      const inside = b === 0 ? "x" : `x ${formatSigned(-b)}`;
      if (a === 1) return inside;
      if (a === -1) return `-(${inside})`;
      return `(${inside})/${a}`;
    }

    function endBehaviorLabel(degree, leading) {
      if (degree % 2 === 0) {
        return leading > 0 ? "left up, right up" : "left down, right down";
      }
      return leading > 0 ? "left down, right up" : "left up, right down";
    }

    function superscript(value) {
      const digits = new Map([
        ["-", "⁻"],
        ["0", "⁰"],
        ["1", "¹"],
        ["2", "²"],
        ["3", "³"],
        ["4", "⁴"],
        ["5", "⁵"],
        ["6", "⁶"],
        ["7", "⁷"],
        ["8", "⁸"],
        ["9", "⁹"],
      ]);
      return String(value)
        .split("")
        .map((character) => digits.get(character) || character)
        .join("");
    }

    function formatNumber(value) {
      if (Number.isInteger(value)) return String(value);
      return value.toFixed(4).replace(/0+$/, "").replace(/\.$/, "");
    }

    function formatTick(value) {
      if (Math.abs(value) < 0.0001) return "0";
      return Math.abs(value) >= 10 ? value.toFixed(0) : value.toFixed(1);
    }

    function uniqueName() {
      return `quiz-answer-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`;
    }
  })();
</script>
